name: Patema
description: The main character of Patema Inverted. She is a resident of a village that lives deep underground, and often challenges the rule that forbids leaving the village's limits. Throughout the movie, Patema is shown to have an inverted gravity in comparison to those who dwell on the surface, meaning she could fall upwards through the sky should nothing bound her to land.
mediaTitles: Patema Inverted: Beginning of the Day

name: Ranni
description: Ranni is the daughter of Radagon and Rennala. After Radagon departed and became the consort to Marika, Ranni and her siblings were raised to demigod status, as they were now the children of the consort of a goddess. She appears to have some involvement in The Night of Black Knives, where Black Knife Assassins stole a shard of the Rune of Death and murdered Godwyn, the Golden. At the same time, Ranni seems to have lost her original body and now resides as spirit inhabiting an artificial doll body

description: A Master Triple Magician whom everyone in the kingdom knows who she is due to her magical prowess, thus her nickname as the Magician of Fallen Leaves. She taught Muller magic before teaching Taichi and Rin.

name: Rika Seto
description: Rika a member of the group [Merm4id](https://anilist.co/staff/301473/Merm4id). Holding "Life is to enjoy!" as her motto, Rika leads a positive university life. Loves to dance and sing with her friends at parties. She starts her DJ activities with her best friend Marika along with Saori and Dalia who she met by chance. She is a gifted individual who overcomes anything with luck and charm.

name: Rise Matsumoto
description: The current student council president who has very little presence and often speaks in a whispery quiet voice that only a few people such as Nana can understand.

name: Ritsuka Hara
description: Landlord of the apartment [Koduka](https://anilist.co/character/143660) lives in. She is good at cooking.

name: SAI Nanami
description: Sai Nanami is the son of the owner of Nanami Conglomerate and the older brother of Ryusui Nanami. While he is a prodigy in mathematics and is said to be "a million times" better than the average person (according to Ryusui), Sai's passion lies in coding, and he claims himself to be a programmer rather than a mathematician.

name: Shingetsu Ernesta Fukami
description: Shingetsu Ernesta Fukami comes from a line of powerful mages from eastern Europe. Anna Fugo hates her, for an apparent past betrayal. Her Armanox is Viola Katze.

name: Shukaku
description: Shukakku is the demon that is in Gaara giving him most of his power AND his insanity. Shukakku is able to fire off sand chunks that look like and act like kunai. In the English dub, Shukakku is made sounding like an insane cowboy. Shukkaku is the Ichibi, which is the One-Tail Jinchuriki. Shukkaku is very powerful as Gaara can still not fully control him.

name: Shuutarou Kurusu
description: An A-class vampire and rookie on the squad.

searchTerms: MARS RED Mini Anime: Zero Kikan Nippou

name: Sumi Izumi
description: Sumi Izumi is an introverted woman who struggles with crippling depression and anxiety which caused her lack of motivation to do anything productive in life. She works part-time at an arcade after quitting her previous job as a salarywoman. She is a pessimistic person which causes her to push away people from connecting with her due to a lack of self-esteem.
mediaTitles: Nande Ikiteru ka Wakaranai Hito: Izumi Sumi 25-sai
searchTerms: Nande Ikiteru ka Wakaranai Hito: Izumi Sumi 25-sai

name: Tao
description: Music producer responsible for a record number of contemporary hits. The full profile is classified. ~!In episode 24, it was revealed that he is a child genetically engineered by professor Zeeman, who also did the same with Angela.!~

name: Ushio Aotsuki
description: The son of a temple priest and a lady shaman, destined to wield the Beast Spear and defeat the super yokai Hakumen no Mono. He is very kind-hearted and greatly values all life and friendships. With his ideals, he manages to unite the forces of mankind and yokai against Hakumen through his example of his fighting partnership with Tora. Ushio loves Asako and cares a lot for Mayuko, and will promptly appear to save them from yokai attacks. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Aya Shameimaru
description: A tengu who has been in Gensokyo for over 1000 years, when oni were still around. Her origin is a crow. She has the ability to manipulate wind. Her character is honest but not rigid. She is polite to strong people, and deals more firmly with weak people. However, she is always polite when conducting an interview. name: Azriel
description: The first Flügel created by Artosh and Representative of the Council of Eighteen Wings. As such, her title allows her to have first say in emergencies. She calls Jibril her "little sister". During the war, she conveyed Artosh's will among other Flügel. After the war, she passed the law in which Flügel shared books among each other. Azriel has a somewhat split personality, being peppy and bubbly to a cold, relentless state. Prior to Jibril's creation, Azriel was merciless and considered other Flü

name: Chaika Bohdan
nativeName: チャイカ・ボフダーン
description: Looks identical to "White Chaika", except her hair is in a shorter bowl cut, and she wears a different outfit which is red rather than white. Like White Chaika, her speech is distorted grammatically, and she also carries a giant coffin which has rollers and rope to pull along. She is essentially the opposite of White Chaika in terms of personality; stubborn, aggressive, and loud-mouthed. She carries a longsword with a snake blade as her weapon.
searchTerms: チャイカ・ボフダーン
